title: Listiq AI: The AI that reports the dents instead of retouching them | Product Hunt
excerpt: Every AI photo tool "enhances" cars by hiding rust and smoothing dents. Listiq AI does the opposite: it's never allowed to lie about the car. Drop a photo on our homepage and watch four AIs work: Identify it (make, model,generation), check it for damage (every visible flaw, with severity), decode its VIN (specs + open recalls from NHTSA), then let the AI stage it on the background that sells it best — the car itself stays pixel-honest. Free, no signup, photos never stored.

Free, no signup, photos never stored.

blocks.html_en: Every AI photo tool "enhances" cars by hiding rust and smoothing dents. Listiq AI does the opposite: it's never allowed to lie about the car. Drop a photo on our homepage and watch four AIs work: Identify it (make, model,generation), check it for damage (every visible flaw, with severity), decode its VIN (specs + open recalls from NHTSA), then let the AI stage it on the background that sells it best — the car itself stays pixel-honest. sentences.en: Every AI photo tool "enhances" cars by hiding rust and smoothing dents.
sentences.zh: 每个人工智能照片工具都通过隐藏锈迹和平滑凹痕来“增强”汽车。

sentences.en: Listiq AI does the opposite: it's never allowed to lie about the car.
sentences.zh: Listiq AI 则反其道而行之：它永远不允许对汽车撒谎。

sentences.en: Drop a photo on our homepage and watch four AIs work: Identify it (make, model,generation), check it for damage (every visible flaw, with severity), decode its VIN (specs + open recalls from NHTSA), then let the AI stage it on the background that sells it best — the car itself stays pixel-honest.
sentences.zh: 在我们的主页上放一张照片，观看四个人工智能的工作：识别它（品牌、型号、代），检查它是否有损坏（每个可见的缺陷，及其严重程度），解码它的 VIN（规格 + NHTSA 的公开召回），然后让人工智能将它放在最畅销的背景上 - 汽车本身保持像素诚实。

sentences.en: Free, no signup, photos never stored.
sentences.zh: 免费，无需注册，照片从不存储。

content_html_zh: 每个人工智能照片工具都通过隐藏锈迹和平滑凹痕来“增强”汽车。 Listiq AI 则反其道而行之：它永远不允许对汽车撒谎。 在我们的主页上放一张照片，观看四个人工智能的工作：识别它（品牌、型号、代），检查它是否有损坏（每个可见的缺陷，及其严重程度），解码它的 VIN（规格 + NHTSA 的公开召回），然后让人工智能将它放在最畅销的背景上 - 汽车本身保持像素诚实。 免费，无需注册，照片从不存储。
